description: Explicit allowlist of files that ship to the public repo (Agents.Domdhi). Consumed by .claude/core/publish.js. A hardcoded DEFAULT_EXCLUDES list in publish.js ALWAYS applies on top of this — see publish.js for the safety-net set (handoff, .output, todo, research, app, design, timeline, settings.local.json, push-guardrail.json, .git, node_modules, coverage, test-results). publish.js also applies PATH_REMAPS — currently dormant for the workshop's own publishes (we ship a leaner template without meta-docs), but the mechanism remains for adopters who want to relocate their own docs at publish time. Root configs (.gitignore, .playwright/) are NOT in this manifest — they are scaffolded into the target from .claude/templates/root/ by scaffold.js, which publish.js runs after the file copy phase. The workshop-only root CLAUDE.md is NOT shipped — adopters write their own at /specialize time. vitest.config.mjs ships so adopters can run `npm test` against the included Vitest suite.
